thinks.think: A static collage displays university campus imagery. Top left shows a rust-colored sign reading "STUDENT UNIO." Top center features a dark plaque for "Missoula College The University of Montana Administration Building Erected 1968." Bottom left depicts a red brick building. Bottom right shows a sign for "Montana State University Northern Donaldson Hall Commons." A central logo reads "Montana University System.

The top-left panel pans upward on the rust-colored sign, revealing the curved metal structure above the white "STUDENT" text. Simultaneously, the bottom-right quadrant becomes heavily blurred, turning the brick building and trees into indistinct shapes. The central logo and remaining panels stay static.

The collage layout rearranges. The top-left panel reveals a stone archway with ornate carvings and partial text. The top-right shows a close-up of rusted metal letters. The bottom-right quadrant displays a wide shot of a modern building with a dark, angular roof under a cloudy sky, eventually showing a "BITTERROOT" sign in the foreground. The central logo remains.

The collage transitions to four new scenes around central text reading "All About Credit." Top left shows a red brick building with an arched entryway. Top right depicts an interior lobby with a curved reception desk and hanging banners. Bottom left features a pond with tall green reeds. Bottom right displays a bronze bison statue standing on a rock.

The collage layout shifts horizontally. The red brick building moves to the top center, and the bronze bison statue shifts to the bottom center. A new image featuring bright pink and red flowers appears in the bottom right corner. A sliver of a grassy path becomes visible on the far left edge. The central text remains.

The collage vanishes, replaced by a single shot of a young man with short brown hair sitting at a desk. He wears a white t-shirt and writes in a spiral notebook with a pen. A red desk lamp stands on the wooden surface near a white door in the background.

The shot holds steady on a young man with short brown hair seated at a desk, focused on writing in a spiral-bound notebook using a pen. He wears a white t-shirt with a black and blue design. A red desk lamp stands on the table next to a closed white door.

The static shot persists on a young man with short brown hair seated at a desk, writing in a spiral notebook. He wears a white t-shirt with a graphic print and holds a pen. A red desk lamp sits on the table near a closed white door. He remains focused on his work, looking down at the open book.

The young man with short brown hair remains seated at the desk beneath the red lamp. Wearing a white graphic t-shirt, he focuses on the open spiral notebook. He writes with a pen in his right hand, then lifts the pen slightly while continuing to read the text on the page.

The young man remains seated at the desk, now holding a blue and yellow envelope in his left hand. He looks from the envelope to his notebook. The camera angle shifts to an over-the-shoulder perspective, showing the text "Large Datasets" clearly printed on the open spiral-bound textbook page.

The person holds a dark blue envelope featuring a yellow strip with text like "ANNUAL FEE". He uses his right hand to tear open the top white flap of the envelope while holding the base with his left. He then begins to slide a card or paper out from the interior.

The person continues manipulating the dark blue envelope with the yellow strip, using his right hand to reach inside the torn white flap. He begins to pull a card or document out from within the envelope while the textbook page titled "Large Datasets" remains open on the desk surface below.

The person extracts a white document with a yellow header from the blue envelope. He holds the paper with both hands to examine it, while the torn envelope rests on the desk near the open spiral notebook. The camera maintains an over-the-shoulder perspective.

The person holds a white document with a yellow header reading "THE AMEX EVERYDAY CREDIT CARD." He positions a plastic sleeve containing a silver card against the paper with his right hand. A white wristband with black lettering is visible on his right wrist as he examines the materials over the open textbook.

The camera cuts to a front-facing medium shot of the young man. He wears a white t-shirt with a black and blue graphic design. He looks down at the desk, seated in a dark chair. Behind him, a white door and a dark blue dresser with horizontal handles are visible against a beige wall.

The young man in the white graphic t-shirt lifts his left hand, holding a small, clear plastic object up to eye level. He examines the item closely while seated at the desk. The background features a white door and a dark blue dresser with horizontal handles.

The young man in the white graphic t-shirt holds the clear plastic card sleeve in his left hand. He gazes intently at the card inside the sleeve, maintaining a focused expression while seated in front of the white door and dark blue dresser. His eyes remain fixed on the object.

The young man in the white graphic t-shirt holds a clear plastic card sleeve in his left hand. He shifts his gaze upward and to the right, looking away from the object. The camera focus is lost, rendering the scene significantly blurry.

The young man in the white graphic t-shirt holds the clear plastic card sleeve in his left hand, gazing upward and to the right. The visual clarity degrades significantly as the camera loses focus, rendering the subject and the background furniture, including the blue dresser, extremely blurry and indistinct.

The heavily blurred image of the young man in the white t-shirt holding the plastic sleeve persists briefly before the scene cuts abruptly to a solid black screen. This transition removes all visibility of the room, the blue dresser, and the subject entirely.

The black screen cuts to a bright outdoor scene. A young man in a white graphic t-shirt and sunglasses walks toward the camera in the foreground. Behind him, a man in a dark suit and tie follows. Distant mountains and commercial buildings are visible in the background under daylight.

The young man in the white t-shirt and sunglasses raises a foil-wrapped food item to his mouth and takes a bite. White text reading "COLLEGE STUDENT" appears in the top right corner. In the background, a man in a black suit walks forward.

The white text overlay disappears from the upper right corner. The young man in the foreground turns his head to the right with his mouth open. Behind him, the man in the black suit walks forward smiling, set against a backdrop of distant mountains and commercial buildings.

In the background, a man wearing a black suit and glasses smiles while giving two thumbs up. White text overlay reading "CREDIT COMPANY" appears above him. In the blurry foreground, a young man in a white t-shirt and sunglasses faces right, chewing food.

A green digital counter displaying "$ 0000.00" appears in the top left corner. The text "CREDIT COMPANY" disappears from above the man in the black suit, who continues smiling and giving two thumbs up in the background. The blurry figure in the foreground remains facing right.

A green digital counter in the top left corner updates to display "$ 0006.79". The blurry foreground figure wearing a white t-shirt and sunglasses moves out of the frame to the right. The man in the black suit remains centered in the background, smiling and holding both thumbs up near a street with mountains behind him.

The green digital counter vanishes from the top left corner. The man in the black suit lowers his hands from a thumbs-up gesture to his sides while smiling. The blurry figure in the white shirt and sunglasses is no longer visible in the foreground, leaving the suited man centered against the outdoor background.

A man in a black suit, white shirt, black tie, and glasses stands smiling outdoors with mountains behind him. The visual clarity changes drastically as the camera loses focus, rendering the man and the background scenery significantly blurry compared to the previous sharp frame.

The video cuts to a close-up of the right side of the young man's head and shoulder. He wears a white t-shirt and sunglasses, with short brown hair visible. The background is an out-of-focus street scene with a blurred vehicle passing by.

The young man in the white t-shirt and sunglasses is now drinking from a cup using a green straw. Behind his right shoulder, the man in the black suit, white shirt, and glasses has reappeared in the frame, smiling directly at the camera.

The smiling man in the black suit raises both hands near his face with fingers curled. A green digital counter reading '$ 0008.71' appears in the bottom right corner. The young man in the foreground continues drinking from a cup with a green straw.

The green digital counter in the bottom right corner updates from $0008.71 to $0011.54. The young man in the foreground continues drinking from a cup with a green straw, while the man in the black suit remains in the background, smiling with his hands raised near his face.

The scene cuts to a low-angle view of a person walking on a sidewalk. They wear a white t-shirt, khaki cargo shorts, and black sneakers, carrying black and white shopping bags in their left hand while passing a red brick wall and glass entrance doors.

The individual in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts continues walking away from the low-angle camera along the sidewalk. They hold black and white shopping bags in their left hand. A red brick wall is on the left, and hanging flower baskets hang near the glass building entrance on the right as the person proceeds forward.

The person in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts continues walking away from the low-angle camera along the sidewalk. They carry black and white shopping bags in their left hand, passing a red brick wall on the left and hanging flower baskets near the glass building entrance on the right.

The person in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks away from the low-angle camera on the sidewalk. They carry black and white shopping bags in their left hand, passing a red brick wall on the left and hanging flower baskets near the glass building entrance on the right.

The individual in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts exits the frame to the left. The view remains on the red brick wall and concrete sidewalk. To the right, a hanging flower basket and the glass entrance of a building are visible in the background.

A red brick wall and concrete sidewalk are visible. A green digital counter reading "$ 03" appears in the bottom right corner. A person in a white t-shirt, khaki shorts, and sunglasses walks from the right edge toward the left, carrying a shopping bag, while the counter updates to "$ 0419.58".

A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks left along a sidewalk beside a brick wall, carrying a shopping bag. A green digital counter in the bottom right corner increases from $0419.58 to $0476.30.

A person wearing a white t-shirt, khaki cargo shorts, and sunglasses walks left along a concrete sidewalk adjacent to a red brick wall, carrying a black and white shopping bag. In the bottom right corner, a green digital counter displaying a dollar amount increases from $0476.30 to $0534.82 as the individual progresses across the frame.

A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks left along a brick wall. Behind them, a man in a black suit jumps into the frame from the right with arms raised. A green digital counter in the bottom right corner rapidly increases from $0534.82 to $0649.38.

The person in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks left, nearly leaving the frame. The man in the black suit runs energetically behind them in the same direction. A green digital counter in the bottom left corner updates rapidly, showing a dollar amount increasing to approximately $0821.58.

The individual in the white t-shirt exits the frame to the left. The man in the black suit runs energetically leftward along the sidewalk, nearing the edge. A green digital counter in the bottom left corner displays updating numbers, partially visible as bright green digits on a black background.

The man in the black suit runs off the left edge, leaving the frame empty of people. The green digital counter disappears from the bottom left corner. The camera remains static on the red brick wall and concrete sidewalk.

The man in the black suit runs completely out of the frame to the left side. The green digital counter in the bottom corner vanishes. The camera holds a static shot of the empty red brick wall and concrete sidewalk, with no people remaining in the view.

The scene cuts to an indoor room containing a grey chair, a white door, a laundry hamper with brown bags, and a black dresser. The camera remains static on this arrangement for several seconds. In the final frame, the white door opens slightly, revealing a dark vertical gap along its left edge.

The white door opens inward, and a person wearing khaki shorts steps inside. They hold a large, dark rectangular object in their hands. The grey chair remains in the foreground left, while the laundry hamper and black dresser are unchanged in the background.

A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts enters the room holding a black flat-screen monitor. The back of the monitor faces the camera, displaying ports and hanging cables. They grasp the screen with both hands while standing near the open white door and grey chair.

The person holds the black monitor up, filling the frame with the back panel featuring vents and a central label reading "PROSCAN." A green digital counter appears in the bottom right corner displaying "$ 2043.17" while hands grip the sides of the screen.

The camera zooms in on the back of the black monitor, revealing the 'PROSCAN' label. A green digital counter in the bottom right corner increases from $2110.33 to $2349.92. Hands grip the sides of the screen, and the person's white t-shirt with a black graphic is visible at the top.

The camera maintains a close-up on the back of a black Proscan monitor held by hands. The green digital counter in the bottom right corner updates from $2110.33 to $2349.92. The label with technical specifications and a barcode remains clearly visible in the center of the panel.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a young man in a white graphic t-shirt sitting in a grey chair facing a black monitor on a desk. The green digital counter reading $2349.92 remains visible in the bottom right corner, overlaid on the man's shirt.

The green digital counter overlay disappears from the bottom right corner. The young man in the white graphic t-shirt continues sitting in the grey chair, facing the black monitor on the desk. A pink object rests on top of the monitor. White closet doors are visible in the background behind him.

A person wearing a black suit jacket enters rapidly from the left, moving towards the seated young man in the white graphic t-shirt. The seated individual remains facing the black monitor on the desk, with white closet doors visible in the background behind them.

The person in the black suit jacket reaches toward the seated individual. The scene cuts to a close-up of hands where a silver handcuff is being locked onto the wrist of the person in the white t-shirt. A white silicone wristband with black text reading "I AM" is visible on the wrist alongside the metal restraint.

The camera cuts to a low-angle shot of the man in the black suit smiling down, wearing round glasses. The scene then cuts to the young man in the white t-shirt sitting in the chair, now looking directly at the camera with a serious expression.

The shot widens to show the man in the black suit standing beside the desk, holding the wrist of the seated young man in the white graphic t-shirt. The seated individual looks up at the standing man, who wears glasses and a dark suit, while white closet doors remain visible in the background.

The man in the black suit continues holding the wrist of the seated person in the white graphic t-shirt. The seated individual looks up at the standing man. The setting remains a room with white closet doors and a desk with a black monitor.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of the seated individual in the white graphic t-shirt holding a clear plastic card in his right hand. He looks slightly to his right with a neutral expression. Behind him, a white door and a dark blue dresser with gold handles are visible against the beige wall.

The young man in the white graphic t-shirt lowers the clear card from view. The scene cuts to him sitting at a wooden desk with a bright red lamp. He is looking down at a spiral notebook surrounded by scattered papers. A white door is visible in the background behind the desk as he faces right.

The individual in the white graphic shirt sits at the wooden desk beneath the red lamp. He reaches his right hand down below the desk surface near the spiral notebook. He pulls open a wooden drawer located under the desk. His head turns slightly downward to look into the open drawer space near the white door.

The individual in the white graphic t-shirt stands up from the grey chair and exits the frame to the right. The wooden desk remains in the shot, holding the bright red lamp, open spiral notebook, and scattered papers near the white door. The grey chair back is visible on the right edge.

A circular graphic overlay depicting a landscape with mountains, water, and crossed tools fades onto the screen over the empty desk. A banner within the graphic reads "ORO -Y- PLATA". The scene transitions to a solid blue background centering the full seal, which includes the partial text "THE GREA" at the top.

The circular graphic featuring mountains, water, and 'ORO -Y- PLATA' transitions from a room overlay to a centered position on a solid blue background. The text along the upper rim of the seal expands to become fully visible, reading 'THE GREAT SEAL OF'.

The circular seal remains centered on a solid blue background. The black text along the upper gold rim completes its expansion, now fully reading "THE GREAT SEAL OF THE STATE OF MONTANA". The central illustration featuring mountains, water, and crossed mining tools above the "ORO -Y- PLATA" banner remains static.

The blue background featuring the Great Seal of the State of Montana transitions to a solid grey screen. This cuts to a white background displaying a black logo reading "The Peer Connection Network" above a television outline with an antenna. The URL "umt.edu/oss/kpcn" appears in black text at the bottom.

The black text logo "The Peer Connection Network" and URL "umt.edu/oss/kpcn" remain fixed on a white background. Inside the television outline, white silhouettes of hands and arms appear against a light blue sky, animating within the screen frame to form distinct shapes.

The black text logo and URL remain fixed on a white background. Inside the television outline, white silhouettes of hands and arms against a blue sky animate to spell "KPCN", with the letter "N" becoming fully visible on the right side of the screen frame.

[18-24] The camera shifts to an over-the-shoulder view as he picks up a dark blue envelope with a yellow strip reading "ANNUAL FEE". He tears open the white flap of the envelope while the textbook page titled "Large Datasets" lies open on the desk. He reaches inside to extract the contents.

[34-38] He looks upward and to the right, away from the object, as the camera loses focus, making the subject and the blue dresser extremely blurry and indistinct. [38-40] The heavily blurred view cuts to a black screen. [40-42] The video cuts to a sunny outdoor scene where the young man, now wearing sunglasses, walks forward while a man in a dark suit and tie follows in the background near distant mountains and buildings.

[28-30] A young man in a white t-shirt with a black and blue graphic sits indoors near a white door and blue dresser. [42-46] Outdoors, the young man, labeled "COLLEGE STUDENT," wears sunglasses and eats a foil-wrapped item while a man in a black suit walks forward in the background. [46-50] The background man, labeled "CREDIT COMPANY," smiles and gives two thumbs up as a green counter showing "$ 0000.00" appears. [50-54] The counter updates to "$ 0006.79" as the student exits the frame right. The counter vanishes, and the suited man lowers his hands to his sides.

From [54-56], a man in a black suit, white shirt, and glasses stands smiling outdoors with mountains behind him as the camera loses focus. [56-64] The video cuts to a young man in a white t-shirt and sunglasses drinking from a cup with a green straw. The man in the suit reappears behind him, smiling and raising his hands near his face. A green digital counter appears reading '$ 0008.71' and updates to '$ 0011.54'. [64-70] The scene changes to a low-angle view of a person in a white t-shirt and khaki cargo shorts walking away on a sidewalk. They carry black and white shopping bags in their left hand, passing a red brick wall and hanging flower baskets near a building entrance.

[70-74] A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks away from a low-angle camera carrying black and white shopping bags, passing a red brick wall on the left and hanging flower baskets near a glass building entrance on the right before exiting left. [74-80] The view shifts to a static shot of the brick wall where a green digital counter appears reading "$ 03". The person, wearing sunglasses and khaki cargo shorts, walks right to left carrying a bag as the counter updates to "$ 0419.58", "$ 0476.30", and "$ 0534.82". [80-86] A man in a black suit enters from the right, jumping and running energetically behind the first person. The counter rapidly increases to "$ 0649.38" and "$ 0821.58" as both individuals exit the frame to the left, leaving the brick wall empty.

[86-90] A man in a black suit runs off the left edge, leaving a static shot of a red brick wall and concrete sidewalk as a green digital counter disappears. [90-96] The scene cuts indoors to a room with a grey chair, white door, laundry hamper with brown bags, and a black dresser. A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts enters through the opening door carrying a black flat-screen monitor. [96-102] The camera focuses on the back of the monitor, displaying a "PROSCAN" label. A green digital counter appears in the bottom right, increasing from "$ 2043.17" to "$ 2110.33" and finally "$ 2349.92" as hands hold the device steady.

[104-106] A green digital counter overlay disappears. A young man in a white graphic t-shirt sits in a grey chair facing a black monitor with a pink object, backed by white closet doors. [106-110] A man in a black suit jacket enters rapidly and locks a silver handcuff onto the seated man's wrist, beside a white wristband reading "I AM". [110-112] The suited man, wearing round glasses, smiles down from a low angle; the seated man looks at the camera seriously. [112-116] The suited man stands beside the desk holding the wrist as the seated man looks up. [116-118] The seated man holds a clear plastic card, looking right, near a dark blue dresser with gold handles.

[120-124] An individual in a white graphic shirt sits at a wooden desk beneath a red lamp, opens a drawer, then stands and exits right, leaving the desk with scattered papers and a notebook near a grey chair. [124-130] A circular graphic overlay depicting mountains, water, and crossed tools with a banner "ORO -Y- PLATA" fades in over the empty room. The view transitions to a solid blue background centering the seal. Text on the gold rim animates from "THE GREA" to "THE GREAT SEAL OF" and fully resolves to "THE GREAT SEAL OF THE STATE OF MONTANA" around the static landscape illustration.

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A static collage displays university imagery. Top left shows a rust-colored sign reading "STUDENT UNIO." Top center features a plaque for "Missoula College The University of Montana Administration Building Erected 1968." Bottom left depicts a red brick building. Bottom right shows a sign for "Montana State University Northern Donaldson Hall Commons." A central logo reads "Montana University System." [2-4] The top-left panel pans upward on the "STUDENT" sign, revealing curved metal. Simultaneously, the bottom-right quadrant becomes heavily blurred. [4-6] The layout rearranges. Top left reveals a stone archway with carvings. Top right shows rusted metal letters. Bottom right displays a modern building with a dark roof and a "BITTERROOT" sign. [6-8] The collage transitions to four scenes around text "All About Credit." Top left shows a red brick building. Top right depicts an interior lobby with banners. Bottom left features a pond with reeds. Bottom right displays a bronze bison statue. [8-10] The layout shifts horizontally. The brick building moves top center, the bison shifts bottom center, and pink flowers appear bottom right. [10-12] The collage vanishes, replaced by a young man in a white t-shirt writing in a spiral notebook at a desk with a red lamp. [12-18]

[70-74] A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks away from a low-angle camera carrying black and white shopping bags, passing a red brick wall on the left and hanging flower baskets near a glass building entrance on the right before exiting left. [74-80] The view shifts to a static shot of the brick wall where a green digital counter appears reading "$ 03". The person, wearing sunglasses and khaki cargo shorts, walks right to left carrying a bag as the counter updates to "$ 0419.58", "$ 0476.30", and "$ 0534.82". [80-86] A man in a black suit enters from the right, jumping and running energetically behind the first person. The counter rapidly increases to "$ 0649.38" and "$ 0821.58" as both individuals exit the frame to the left, leaving the brick wall empty.

[86-90] A man in a black suit runs off the left edge, leaving a static shot of a red brick wall and concrete sidewalk as a green digital counter disappears. [90-96] The scene cuts indoors to a room with a grey chair, white door, laundry hamper with brown bags, and a black dresser. A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts enters through the opening door carrying a black flat-screen monitor. [96-102] The camera focuses on the back of the monitor, displaying a "PROSCAN" label. A green digital counter appears in the bottom right, increasing from "$ 2043.17" to "$ 2110.33" and finally "$ 2349.92" as hands hold the device steady.

[104-106] A green digital counter overlay disappears. A young man in a white graphic t-shirt sits in a grey chair facing a black monitor with a pink object, backed by white closet doors. [106-110] A man in a black suit jacket enters rapidly and locks a silver handcuff onto the seated man's wrist, beside a white wristband reading "I AM". [110-112] The suited man, wearing round glasses, smiles down from a low angle; the seated man looks at the camera seriously. [112-116] The suited man stands beside the desk holding the wrist as the seated man looks up. [116-118] The seated man holds a clear plastic card, looking right, near a dark blue dresser with gold handles.

[120-124] An individual in a white graphic shirt sits at a wooden desk beneath a red lamp, opens a drawer, then stands and exits right, leaving the desk with scattered papers and a notebook near a grey chair. [124-130] A circular graphic overlay depicting mountains, water, and crossed tools with a banner "ORO -Y- PLATA" fades in over the empty room. The view transitions to a solid blue background centering the seal. Text on the gold rim animates from "THE GREA" to "THE GREAT SEAL OF" and fully resolves to "THE GREAT SEAL OF THE STATE OF MONTANA" around the static landscape illustration.
